name: Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd. provides securities services in Taiwan. The company engages in the general brokerage of market securities and self-financing securities, stock index futures, options, and foreign securities; and securities trading business. It is also involved in the provision of securities underwriting and issuing, and financial advisory services; and futures business. In addition, the company offers bond buyout and selling services; and bond investment advisory services. Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
